description: Movers 22-Timeframe — full-universe mover snapshots across 22 cadences. Phase 11 of v3 plan (2026-04-28). 24 panels: Stocks (2 — Gainers/Losers) + Index (2) + Options (7) + Futures (7) + Depth (6) covering the existing market_depth/deep_market_depth tables.

targets.rawSql: SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct, volume FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'E' ORDER BY change_pct DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct, volume FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'E' ORDER BY change_pct ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'I' ORDER BY change_pct DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'I' ORDER BY change_pct ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, open_interest FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY open_interest DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, oi_change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY oi_change_pct DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, oi_change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY oi_change_pct ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, volume FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, ltp * volume AS value FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY change_pct DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, strike_price, option_type, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('OPTIDX','OPTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY change_pct ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, spot_price, ltp - spot_price AS premium FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY premium DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, spot_price, ltp - spot_price AS premium FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY premium ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, volume FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, oi_change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY oi_change_pct DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, oi_change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY oi_change_pct ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY change_pct DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT underlying_symbol, ltp, change_pct FROM movers_${timeframe} WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND segment = 'D' AND instrument_type IN ('FUTIDX','FUTSTK') AND expiry_date BETWEEN '${expiry_from}' AND '${expiry_to}' ORDER BY change_pct ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT security_id, ltp, ask_price[0] - bid_price[0] AS spread FROM market_depth WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) ORDER BY spread DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT security_id, ltp, ask_price[0] - bid_price[0] AS spread FROM market_depth WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) AND ask_price[0] > bid_price[0] ORDER BY spread ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT security_id, bid_qty[0] + bid_qty[1] + bid_qty[2] + bid_qty[3] + bid_qty[4] AS bid_pressure FROM market_depth WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) ORDER BY bid_pressure DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT security_id, ask_qty[0] + ask_qty[1] + ask_qty[2] + ask_qty[3] + ask_qty[4] AS ask_pressure FROM market_depth WHERE ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) ORDER BY ask_pressure DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM deep_market_depth WHERE security_id IN (${nifty_atm_ce}, ${nifty_atm_pe}) AND ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT * FROM deep_market_depth WHERE security_id IN (${banknifty_atm_ce}, ${banknifty_atm_pe}) AND ts > dateadd('s', -90, now()) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 200

title: Movers 22-TF (Phase 11 of v3 plan)
